title: Nexus SyncPullResponse
description: Response body for POST /v1/sync/pull — bundles to apply locally plus server cursors.

world_revision.description: Server world revision after the returned window

confirmed_delta_sequence.description: Server confirmed delta sequence after the returned window

is_up_to_date.description: True when there are no further bundles to fetch for this cursor

bundles.description: Bundles the client should apply (e.g. stage into local outbox)
